mapper.sql: id, product_code, product_name, category, brand, model, specification, price, cost_price, stock_quantity, sold_quantity, min_stock, image_url, description, status, is_hot, is_new, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_product WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_product WHERE product_code = #{productCode} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_product
product_code = #{productCode}, product_name = #{productName}, category = #{category}, brand = #{brand}, model = #{model}, specification = #{specification}, price = #{price}, cost_price = #{costPrice}, stock_quantity = #{stockQuantity}, sold_quantity = #{soldQuantity}, min_stock = #{minStock}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, is_hot = #{isHot}, is_new = #{isNew}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_product WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM t_product WHERE category = #{category} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM t_product WHERE status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM t_product WHERE is_hot = 1 AND status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sold_quantity DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM t_product WHERE is_new = 1 AND status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM t_product WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_product WHERE is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE t_product SET sold_quantity = sold_quantity + #{quantity}, stock_quantity = stock_quantity - #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_product WHERE stock_quantity <= min_stock AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY stock_quantity ASC
